summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five open PR inventory items using the provided hydrated cluster preflight artifact. No GitHub mutations are recommended because merge preflight proof is incomplete for all items: mergeability is unknown, Codex /review clean-pass proof is missing for each merge candidate, and #80473 has a failing lint check. Items remain independently classifiable with concrete blockers.

actions.reason: Useful contributor PR with passing checks and sufficient proof, but not merge-ready under policy without current mergeability and Codex /review proof.
Small useful fix, but policy requires resolving author-followup/review-bot state and proving clean review before merge.
Product/session-state behavior and active waiting-on-author status make finalization a maintainer judgment call in this plan shard.

needs_human: #80422 requires maintainer judgment: Android feature PR changes session-state behavior, is labeled waiting on author, and the artifact lacks hydrated comments to resolve the author-followup/product-intent question.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair/finalization plan for five independent open PRs in the inventory shard. Prioritize contributor-branch repair where maintainer_can_modify is true; do not open replacement PRs until a specific branch is proven unrepairable. #80473 needs lint repair/revalidation. #80383, #80392, and #80455 need current mergeability plus Codex /review proof before merge. #80422 should wait for maintainer decision because it is a session-state Android feature with active author-followup signal.
repair_candidate.pr_body:
Cluster: live-pr-inventory-20260617T015524-007

This plan does not open a replacement PR yet. The useful contributor PRs are editable by maintainers, so the next executable path is to repair or refresh contributor branches in place, prove mergeability, run Codex /review, and rerun targeted validation. #80473 additionally needs the failing check-lint result repaired or revalidated. #80422 should not be finalized until a maintainer resolves the session-state feature/author-followup question.

Source PRs: #80383, #80392, #80422, #80455, #80473.

Credit: carry forward the original authors in any repair commit, replacement PR body, and changelog entry where user-facing behavior changes.
validation_commands: For #80383: run the ACP/session actor queue targeted tests plus pnpm check:changed after branch refresh.
For #80392: run the gateway startup trace proof and gateway startup/runtime checks plus pnpm check:changed after resolving bot/author state.
For #80422: rerun Android build/test shards and obtain maintainer confirmation on session-state UX before merge consideration.
For #80455: run doctor health contribution tests and pnpm check:changed after branch refresh.
For #80473: fix/revalidate lint, then run oxlint/check-lint for extensions/discord/src/monitor/native-command-route.ts plus pnpm check:changed.
